# Unsafe Bypass Enforcement

<!-- Generated by go run ./tools/unsafebypassevidence -write-doc. Do not edit by hand. -->

[Back to enforcement locations](../enforcement-locations.md)

Executable SSOT: [`unsafe-bypass.riido.json`](unsafe-bypass.riido.json).

Evidence artifact: `unsafe-bypass-evidence`.

Proves provider-native approval bypass surfaces are explicit policy surfaces and remain denied by default on Host/Unknown trust tiers.

## Enforcement Matrix

| Provider | Surface | Flag | Enforcement | Host / Unknown default | Evidence |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Claude | `claude:bypassPermissions` | `--permission-mode bypassPermissions` | C4 Claude provider BuildStart | deny | `policy-surface-claude`, `claude-buildstart-policy`, `claude-host-test`, `claude-custom-filter` |
| Cursor | `cursor:--yolo` | `--yolo` | C4 Cursor provider BuildStart | deny | `policy-surface-cursor`, `cursor-buildstart-policy`, `cursor-host-test`, `cursor-trust-not-yolo`, `cursor-blocked-args` |
| Codex | `codex:--yolo` | `--yolo` | C4 Codex provider custom arg filter | deny | `policy-surface-codex-yolo`, `codex-arg-catalog`, `codex-custom-test`, `codex-equals-test` |
| Codex | `codex:--dangerously-bypass-approvals-and-sandbox` | `--dangerously-bypass-approvals-and-sandbox` | C4 Codex provider custom arg filter | deny | `policy-surface-codex-danger`, `codex-arg-catalog`, `codex-custom-test`, `codex-equals-test` |

## Assertions

- Host and Unknown trust tiers deny every unsafe bypass surface even if a policy bundle claims allow.
- Isolated trust tiers require an explicit policy bundle allow before a provider-native bypass may be emitted.
- Codex full-access sandbox is not an unsafe bypass surface; caller-provided approval-bypass args remain filtered.
